content:
Item 12.Security Ownership of Certain Beneficial Owners and Management and Related Stockholder Matters.
Information with respect to security ownership of certain beneficial owners and management is incorporated by reference from the discussion under the heading “Stock Ownership Information” of the Company’s Proxy Statement for the Annual Meeting of Shareholders to be held [DATE_TIME].
Equity Compensation Plan Information
The following table summarizes information about the options, warrants and rights and other equity compensation under the Company’s equity compensation plans as of the close of business on [DATE_TIME]. The table does not include information about tax qualified plans such as the Merck U.S. Savings Plan.
(1)Includes options to purchase shares of Company Common Stock and other rights under the following shareholder-approved plans: the Merck & Co., Inc. [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] Incentive Stock Plans, and the Merck & Co., Inc. [DATE_TIME] Non-Employee Directors Stock Option Plan.
(2)Excludes approximately 11,914,491 shares of restricted stock units and 2,099,739 performance share units (assuming maximum payouts) under the Merck Sharp & Dohme [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] Incentive Stock Plans. Also excludes 193,746 shares of phantom stock deferred under the MSD Employee Deferral Program and 564,209 shares of phantom stock deferred under the Merck & Co., Inc. Plan for Deferred Payment of Directors’ Compensation.
Item 13.
